name: Prospeo API
what_it_does: Prospeo REST API — email finder and sales intelligence platform that discovers and verifies professional email addresses from LinkedIn profiles and company domains, enabling agents to automate lead enrichment and outbound prospecting workflows.
use_cases: Agents enriching CRM leads with verified email addresses found from LinkedIn profile URLs via Prospeo
Domain prospecting — agents generating contact lists from company domains for outbound sales campaigns
LinkedIn automation — agents extracting emails from Sales Navigator search results at scale
Data enrichment pipelines — agents enriching contact records with professional email addresses from LinkedIn data
Lead qualification — agents verifying email deliverability before triggering outbound sequences
not_for: Consumer email finding — Prospeo focuses on professional B2B email discovery, not consumer/personal addresses
Phone number lookup — Prospeo is email-focused; use Apollo.io or ZoomInfo for phone enrichment
Large-scale bulk enrichment — Prospeo's credits model becomes expensive at millions of contacts; use specialized data providers
best_when: You're automating B2B outbound sales prospecting and need to find verified professional emails from LinkedIn profiles or company domains at reasonable cost.
avoid_when: You need comprehensive contact data beyond email (phone, address, social) — use Apollo.io or Hunter.io for broader enrichment.

auth.notes: API key from Prospeo dashboard. Passed as X-KEY header. Single key with full account access. Credit-based model — each API call consumes credits. No scope granularity.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 75 free credits on signup for testing
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter: $39/month (1,000 credits); Growth: $99/month (5,000 credits); Pro: $199/month (15,000 credits); custom enterprise plans
pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing where each email find/verify consumes 1 credit. Unused credits roll over. Annual plans offer ~20% discount. Pay-as-you-go top-ups available.

performance.rate_limits: 100 req/min on standard plans; bulk endpoint available for higher throughput

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Simple REST API with clear response format. Email found/not found status in response. Confidence scores and verification status returned. Error responses include descriptive messages. Limited documentation depth.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Email lookup for same input always returns same result (credits consumed on each call even for repeat lookups). No idempotency keys — agents should cache results to avoid consuming credits on duplicate lookups.
known_agent_gotchas: Each API call consumes credits even if result is 'email not found' — agents should cache previous lookups to avoid duplicate credit consumption
LinkedIn URL format must be canonical (linkedin.com/in/username) — agents must normalize URLs before submitting
Email verification result has confidence scores — agents should threshold on score (>0.8) before adding to outreach lists
Rate limit (100 req/min) requires pacing for bulk enrichment — implement queue with rate limiter
GDPR compliance requires agents to have legitimate interest or consent basis before enriching contact data

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant — EU-based company with EU data processing. TLS enforced. API key with no scope granularity. Agents must ensure GDPR compliance in their use of discovered email data. No SOC2.
